homepage.title: start page - R+W Kupplungen
homepage.description: Welcome to R+W Antriebselemente in Wörth - your reliable partner for high-quality precision and industrial couplings. We offer innovative solutions for a wide range of applications in various industries. Discover our wide range of products and let our expertise convince you!
homepage.text_excerpt:
start page - R+W Kupplungen
Reliable connection elements
from
R+W
Custom-fit solutions – with just a few clicks
Configure and visualize your coupling with our CAD configurator
Whether precision or industrial: couplings from R+W work dynamically, precisely and backlash-free. They reduce friction to a minimum, are low-wear and maintenance-free – and thus guarantee an extremely long service life and performance. With its broad product portfolio and the innovative technology of couplings, R+W provides the right answer for all torque transmission issues.
Precision
for
Peak
Performance
: Custom Solution Setting
New
Standards
Precision at Extreme Heights: Metal Bellows Couplings with Split Clamp Hubs in the LST Telescope on La Palma
The challenge
: A coupling solution for an LST telescope that withstands fluctuating temperatures, strong winds, and high humidity
The solution
:An aluminum metal bellows coupling from our standard BK series offers the optimal solution for these challenges at the La Palma telescope.
The coupling
: BKH/150/95/35/35 – Metal Bellows Coupling
wide range
of couplings for all requirements
Coupling selection is always dependent on the application and its unique requirements. R+W offers various coupling models for both high precision and heavy industrial machinery types.
Precision couplings transmit torques ranging from 0.05 to 25,000 Nm, depending on the coupling type and size. R+W’s product range includes torsionally rigid metal bellows and miniature bellows couplings, vibration damping elastomer couplings, torque limiting safety couplings, connecting shafts, and servo disc pack couplings in a wide variety of sizes and configurations.
Industrial series couplings transmit torques ranging from 200 to 2,080,000 Nm. Here R+W offers heavy duty safety couplings, torsionally rigid disc pack couplings and flexible gear couplings, along with larger sizes of metal bellows couplings and elastomer couplings.
Smart and secure into the future – the intelligent coupling from R+W is our innovative answer to modern requirements for digitalization, automation, and the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT).

products.text:
Product category overview - R+W Kupplungen
R+W
Coupling Categories
Our products are divided into three categories: Precision Couplings, Sensor Technology and Industrial Couplings.
The precision couplings are ideal for applications where maximum precision and smooth running are required.
Industrial couplings, on the other hand, are robust and durable and are used in many industrial applications.
Our sensor technology is specially designed for the acquisition of performance data from directly within the drive line, and offers high accuracy and repeatability.
